channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Outside Student Union Building, 5th June
item.description:
Paving slab is tipping and moving
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Percy Circus, Barnsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Phone box glass smashed, 5th June
item.description:
Phone box glass smashed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Market Square, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped lime bikes approx 10 bikes along a 100m stretch, 5th June
item.description:
Dumped lime bikes approx 10 bikes along a 100m stretch . Half laying on their side. From the station car park through the pocket park to the flats the other side.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thomas Dean Road, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Another tree has co join the main tree., 5th June
item.description:
Another tree has co join the main tree, the roots of invited tree has made the pavement crack and causing damage to the garden wall/area of the property of 28.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Cranbrook Road, Upper Belvedere, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Base growth obstructing footway, 5th June
item.description:
The base growth is taking over the footway.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Palmar Crescent, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping . Maybe rubbish bins might help?, 5th June
item.description:
As above . Fly tip Perhaps 2/3 rubbish would help

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westerley Crescent, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Offensive grafitti, 5th June
item.description:
Offensive grafitti daubed on the site of a previously daubed and corrected issue. Third fence panel down from Chipperfield Rd on the left hand side
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 291, Chipperfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly-tip Small - Up to 3 black bags problem has been found, 5th June
item.description:
A Fly-tip Small - Up to 3 black bags problem has been found by Brent Council

Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag (Estates)

item.title: Abandoned road sign after recent works, 5th June
item.description:
Hasn’t been taken away after recent road closures in Hoxton Square for utility works.

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal Advertising on lamppost, 5th June
item.description:
Illegal advertising on lamppost at the corner of Pines Road and Chislehurst Road placed overnight

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bickley Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging plants on footpath, 5th June
item.description:
Please could this footpath be cleared by whoever is responsible for it. It is not safe for pedestrians to walk on the road here.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 89, Hayes Lane, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle. EX03YRG, Silver Toyota Yaris., 5th June
item.description:
Abandoned vehicle. EX03YRG, Silver Toyota Yaris. Been parked outside 1 Holly Park Road, N11 3HB for 8 months. Showing No TAX or MOT on DVLA site.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Holly Park Road, Friern Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole down to sub base, 5th June
item.description:
Pothole so deep in tyre tracks. Stones from Sub base all across road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mason Close, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly poster, 5th June
item.description:
X2 Flyposters on roundabout junction of Bickley park Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bickley Park Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Items left out on pavement, 5th June
item.description:
Households are leaving out unwanted items on verge thinking people will take them this is fly tipping and it makes the area untidy a quiet word or letter to households may make a difference or enforce the law
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cray Avenue, Ramsden, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chairs, gas tank, rubbish dumped on Wetherell road cul de sac, 5th June
item.description:
Enormous gas tank, Chairs, Rubbish dumped on street And caravan camping on public ground next to the Royal Inn on the Park pub. Location is whetherell Road cul de sac

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flyposter, 5th June
item.description:
Please remove fly poster

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Page Heath Lane, Bickley, Greater London

item.title: Fallen branch / limb, 5th June
item.description:

item.title: Damaged fence, 5th June
item.description:
Fence is damaged

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Warner Road, Plaistow, Greater London

item.title: Excessive littering and unclean surroundings, 5th June
item.description:
Excessive littering causing unacceptable hygiene issues. Council provided bins are not used. Unhoused people rifling through bins and defecating in the area. Greater policing urgent.
Report on FixMyStreet
